extensions.name: Word Count
extensions.description: Shows word count, character count, and reading time in the status bar for the active file.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Custom AI Chat
extensions.description: Full chat panel with pluggable AI provider (OpenAI, Groq, Ollama, etc.) and file system tool calling — read, write, search, edit files.
extensions.author: PiPilot
